direction: 脱木质素竹材/高碘酸钠氧化/二胺改性/热压

label_schema.high_relevance: 高相关：研究对象和方法路线均贴近用户课题。
label_schema.method_useful: 方法可借鉴：研究对象可不同，但氧化、交联、热压或性能评价方法可迁移。
label_schema.background_citation: 背景引用：适合作为生物质材料、界面结合、可持续复合材料等背景证据。
label_schema.irrelevant: 无关/低相关：与材料体系、方法或研究目标距离较远，不应进入 Top N。

papers.label: high_relevance
papers.title: Periodate oxidation and diamine crosslinking of delignified bamboo for hot-pressed composites
papers.abstract: Delignified bamboo was sodium periodate oxidized to introduce aldehyde groups, followed by diamine modification and hot pressing for mechanical strength.
papers.rationale: 完整覆盖对象、氧化、二胺和热压。

papers.label: high_relevance
papers.title: Aldehyde-functionalized bamboo scaffolds strengthened by diamine bonding under hot pressing
papers.abstract: A bamboo cellulose scaffold after delignification and sodium periodate oxidation formed aldehyde amine bonding with diamine crosslinkers during hot pressing.
papers.rationale: 高度贴近用户技术路线。

papers.label: high_relevance
papers.title: Interface engineering of oxidized delignified bamboo using flexible diamines
papers.abstract: Flexible diamines reacted with aldehyde-rich delignified bamboo prepared by periodate oxidation, improving interfacial bonding and hot-pressed panel stability.
papers.rationale: 对象和关键化学反应一致。

papers.label: high_relevance
papers.title: Hot-pressed transparent bamboo laminates via sodium periodate oxidation and amine curing
papers.abstract: Transparent delignified bamboo laminates were oxidized with sodium periodate and cured with diamine-like amine agents before hot pressing.
papers.rationale: 竹材、氧化和热压均相关。

papers.label: high_relevance
papers.title: Mechanical performance of diamine-modified oxidized bamboo cellulose composites
papers.abstract: Bamboo cellulose underwent periodate oxidation and diamine modification, with tensile and thermal stability measured after compression molding.
papers.rationale: 性能评价和化学路线一致。

papers.label: high_relevance
papers.title: Aldehyde amine interfacial networks in hot-pressed delignified bamboo boards
papers.abstract: The work studies aldehyde amine networks generated by periodate oxidation and diamine treatment in hot-pressed delignified bamboo boards.
papers.rationale: 机理和热压板材强相关。

papers.label: high_relevance
papers.title: Sustainable bamboo composites from delignification, periodate oxidation, and diamine crosslinking
papers.abstract: A sustainable bamboo composite route combines delignification, periodate oxidation, diamine crosslinking, and hot pressing.
papers.rationale: 关键路线完整。

papers.label: high_relevance
papers.title: Reaction window for sodium periodate oxidized bamboo sheets cured with diamines
papers.abstract: The paper compares oxidation degree, diamine curing, and hot pressing temperature for delignified bamboo sheets.
papers.rationale: 参数窗口对用户课题直接有用。

papers.label: method_useful
papers.title: Periodate oxidation enables tunable diamine crosslinking in cellulose nanofiber films
papers.abstract: Cellulose nanofiber films were oxidized by sodium periodate and crosslinked with diamines to tune wet strength.
papers.rationale: 对象不同，但氧化和二胺交联方法可迁移。

papers.label: method_useful
papers.title: Aldehyde cellulose aerogels cured by aliphatic diamines
papers.abstract: Periodate-oxidized cellulose aerogels were cured by aliphatic diamines, revealing structure property relationships.
papers.rationale: 可借鉴二胺类型和交联表征。

papers.label: method_useful
papers.title: Hot pressing of lignocellulosic mats with bio-based amine crosslinkers
papers.abstract: Lignocellulosic mats were hot pressed with bio-based amine crosslinkers to improve bonding without synthetic resin.
papers.rationale: 热压和生物质交联工艺可迁移。

papers.label: method_useful

papers.abstract: Oxidized polysaccharides formed Schiff base networks with diamines, improving modulus and water resistance.

papers.abstract: Different diamine chain lengths were compared in aldehyde-rich biomass gels for crosslink density and mechanical properties.
